languages.translation_comment:
Мы несколько раз тыкнули в НПС, а они не обращают на нас внимания.
(универсально для Идира, Кассия, Джай, Арджента, Кибелла).

languages.text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

traits.locale_text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"
"It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"
"It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

languages.text: "Es ist, als wären wir unsichtbar ... Sind die noch bei Verstand?"
languages.original_text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

traits.locale_text: "Es ist, als wären wir unsichtbar ... Sind die noch bei Verstand?"

languages.text: “简直像是我不存在一样……他们疯了吗？”
languages.original_text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

traits.locale_text: “简直像是我不存在一样……他们疯了吗？”

languages.text: « Je pourrais aussi bien être invisible... Est-ce qu'ils ont perdu l'esprit ?»
languages.original_text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

traits.locale_text: « Je pourrais aussi bien être invisible... Est-ce qu'ils ont perdu l'esprit ?»

languages.text: «Me tratan como si fuese invisible... ¿Acaso han perdido el juicio?».
languages.original_text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

traits.locale_text: «Me tratan como si fuese invisible... ¿Acaso han perdido el juicio?».

languages.text: "Sanki görünmezmişim gibi... Bunların aklı başında mı?"
languages.original_text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

traits.locale_text: "Sanki görünmezmişim gibi... Bunların aklı başında mı?"

languages.text: 「まるで自分が目に見えないかのように…彼らは正常な判断をしているのだろうか？」
languages.original_text: "It is as though I were invisible... Are they in their right mind?"

traits.locale_text: 「まるで自分が目に見えないかのように…彼らは正常な判断をしているのだろうか？」
